title: Sales Executive
description:
About us

Founded in 2016, Car Choice Group is one of the largest pre-owned automotive dealerships in Singapore, operating 5 showrooms islandwide. We are dedicated to redefining the car buying experience, focusing on nurturing long-term relationships and ownership. We stand out from our competitors by offering diversified services, which include our in-house loan service GEM Credit, the service center Auto Infinite, and even a home appliances division via SK Magic Singapore. 

Mission & Vision: Driving Progress

  • Mission: Redefine car buying, nurturing long-term relationships, and ownership.

  • Vision: Be the preferred destination for car buying in Singapore while upholding our commitment to sustainability  and social responsibility. 

Why Join Us

  • Attractive Base - High commission with top performers earning up to $10,000/month.

  • Training Provided - Covers essential skills such as loan calculations, customer follow-up, and lead generation. Every new team member is assigned a buddy to provide dedicated mentorship!

  • Growth Opportunities - Continuously learn and advance your career with us with possible promotions or lateral transfer within 2 years for high achievers.

Perks & Benefits

  • Comprehensive Leave Benefits - Enjoy a full suite of leaves inclusive of company initiatives such as Birthday Leave and Parental Care Leave. 

  • Flexi-Benefit Scheme - Enjoy up to $500 flexi-scheme that can be used on travel, medical, or optical expenses.

Responsibilities

  • Foster strong customer relationships and deliver exceptional service.

  • Facilitate the entire sales process, which includes financing, after-sales services, and service arrangements.

  • Maintain impeccable showroom standards and ensure product maintenance is upheld.

Requirements

Valid Class 3/3A driving license is mandatory.

Skills Required

  • Possess good interpersonal and communication skills.

  • Fresh graduates welcomed.

  • Prior experience in sales would be an advantage.

postedCompany.description:
At Car Choice Singapore, we’ve chosen a single purpose: to drive every milestone with you.


Founded in 2016, Car Choice Singapore is now one of Singapore’s leading full-suite car importers, retailing the entire breadth of brand new, pre-owned, and leasing vehicles. With 6 state-of-the-art showrooms islandwide including Singapore’s first multi-brand green showroom and an inhouse service centre, we consistently present a vast collection and dedicated after-sales support in every aspect of selecting, owning and caring for your dream car.


Driven foremost by a culture of sincerity and honesty attested to in hundreds of perfect client reviews, our many recent top-tier accolades in 2022-2023 include the prestigious Singapore Excellent Service Award, SGCarMart Premium Dealer of the Year and Association of Trade and Commerce’s Entrepreneur 100 for two consecutive years. With our brand partner Mark Lee, we are proud to embody the Singapore spirit both in heritage and growth, whilst achieving our vision of being our country’s leading automobile solutions provider with diversified offerings in some of life’s most important products.


To our customers, we have evolved from not only providing the best car buying experience, but the best car owning experience at every step of the way. To our staff, we value everyone’s unique contribution and growth developed around the core philosophy of caring for all.


Car Choice Singapore aims to inspire the world by showing that it is possible to simultaneously drive happiness to customers, staff, business partners, shareholders, and the community in a long-term, sustainable way – at every milestone, together.
postedCompany.name: SG CAR CHOICE LEASING PTE. LTD.
